Documentation for this format

Options Sets

Answer options for op-seite

  • http://snomed.info/sct#80248007 ("Left breast structure")
  • http://snomed.info/sct#73056007 ("Right breast structure")
  • http://snomed.info/sct#63762007 ("Both breasts")

Answer options for op-intention

  • https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/ext/modul-onko/CodeSystem/mii-cs-onko-intention#K ("kurativ")
  • https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/ext/modul-onko/CodeSystem/mii-cs-onko-intention#P ("palliativ")
  • https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/ext/modul-onko/CodeSystem/mii-cs-onko-intention#D ("diagnostisch")
  • https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/ext/modul-onko/CodeSystem/mii-cs-onko-intention#R ("Revision/Komplikation")
  • https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/ext/modul-onko/CodeSystem/mii-cs-onko-intention#S ("sonstiges")
  • https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/ext/modul-onko/CodeSystem/mii-cs-onko-intention#X ("Fehlende Angabe")

Answer options for clavien-dindo

  • http://snomed.info/sct#1367519000 ("Clavien-Dindo classification grade I")
  • http://snomed.info/sct#1367520006 ("Clavien-Dindo classification grade II")
  • http://snomed.info/sct#1367521005 ("Clavien-Dindo classification grade III")
  • http://snomed.info/sct#1367524002 ("Clavien-Dindo classification grade IV")
  • http://snomed.info/sct#1367527009 ("Clavien-Dindo classification grade V")

Answer options for komplikation-zeitpunkt

  • Intraoperativ
  • Postoperativ
  • Stationaer
  • Ambulant
